title: Websait bilong IATF
summary: Web-sait bilong International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF i mas i gat wanpela ples bilong ol man i ken i stap long en, we ol i ken stori long ol samting ol i mas mekim, raitim lista bilong ol projek, na tokim ol lain i laik helpim ol long mekim ol samting i stret long mekim.
why: Dispela sait em i bikpela dua bilong IATF, na ol i wokim olsem wanpela liklik projek, olsem na em i isi long ritim, trensletim, na lukautim long ples klia.
scopeIn: Ol pes bilong ol man i ken go long en we i stori long IATF model
Pablik rejista bilong ol projek bilong IATF em ol i orait long en, ol i wok yet, na ol i stap long arkip wantaim status, man bilong lukautim, ples bilong putim ol samting, na piksa bilong projek
Wanpela pes bilong kisim ol askim na wanpela fom
Ol pes bilong gavman na pasin bilong kamapim ol samting long ples klia
Baibel long tok Inglis i redi long tanim
Static deployment long Cloudflare Workers Static Asets
scopeOut: Ol hap bilong ol memba, ol akaunt, o ol log-in flows
Hosting bilong project source kod, em i stap long wanwan projek's own repository
Toktok long taim stret, em i stap long Discord
Wok bilong painim ol hevi bilong ol wanwan projek, em i stap long GitHub repozitori bilong wan wan projek

title: IATF selfie
summary: Wanpela IATF prototaip, ol i putim long arkip taim ol i kamap long wanpela hap we ol i no inap ron moa.
problem: Ol i mekim wok painimaut long wanpela tul bilong helpim ol man long i go long ol narapela kantri, em IATF i as bilong en.
why: Ol i save putim ol dispela samting long ples klia bilong ol man i ken lukim, maski ol i no mekim wok moa long en.
scopeIn: Pastaim ol i wokim piksa bilong wanpela tul bilong helpim ol man long kliagut long ol tok bilong Baibel
scopeOut: Wok bilong kamapim o kamapim ol nupela samting
Rekomendabel long yusim long wokim ol samting

title: IATF bot
summary: Wanpela IATF komiuniti bot, arkim bihain long em i kamap long wanpela natural stop point.
problem: Ol i mekim ol samting long rot bilong ol lain bilong IATF.
why: Ol i save putim ol dispela samting long ples klia bilong ol man i ken lukim, maski ol i no mekim wok moa long en.
scopeIn: IATF komiuniti kanal i save kamapim ol tok pait long rot bilong ol kompiuta, na ol i save putim ol dispela tok long pablik rekot
scopeOut: Wok bilong kamapim o kamapim ol nupela samting
Rekomendabel long yusim long wokim ol samting
